analysis.name: Horizen
analysis.summary: ZEN近期无明显上涨催化，24小时下跌2.3%，7日微涨0.09%，30日跌幅达29%。项目正迁移至Base L3，但新闻热度低，市场情绪偏弱。

fundamentals: Horizen是隐私公链，2017年公平启动，无ICO
正在升级为Horizen 2.0，部署在Base上的L3应用链
总供应量2100万，流通约1810万，无通胀压力
市值约7832万美元，排名319，较小市值
marketRead: 24小时交易量约980万美元，流动性一般
价格远低于历史高点165.92美元，跌幅97%
risks: 隐私币监管风险，可能被交易所下架
技术迁移进度不确定，用户采用度低
市场整体情绪低迷，资金关注度低

profile.name: Horizen
profile.description: What is the project about?  Horizen is a modular privacy-first platform designed to make privacy technology, such as zero-knowledge proofs and TEEs accessible and usable across the web. Originally launched in 2017 as a fair launch, non-ICO project, Horizen is now undergoing a major evolution with the launch of Horizen 2.0, a next-generation Layer 3 (L3) appchain deployed on Base, the Ethereum Layer 2 developed by Coinbase. Horizen 2.0 is built as an Ethereum-aligned Layer 3 appchain on Base, inheriting Ethereum's security while implementing its own application-level integrity guarantees. Key components of Horizen’s security model include: Ethereum-Aligned Security: As an appchain deployed on Base, Horizen 2.0 benefits from Base’s rollup security and settlement on Ethereum, ensuring robust finality and composability with other L2 and L3 applications. Simplified and Secure Architecture: Unlike Horizen’s previous iterations (which used a hybrid PoW/PoS model), Horizen 2.0 focuses on application-level security, decentralization of its privacy layers, and composability with existing infrastructure — reducing complexity and increasing user safety.
